channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Podcast: New 3D-printed device targets high blood pressure treatment
item.description: Professor Tao Zhou, supported by the U.S. National Science Foundation, discusses a new 3D-printed hydrogel-based bioelectronic device for hypertension.

item.title: NSF launches Project Triad to advance quantum technology for real-world use
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced Project Triad, a first-of-its-kind initiative to integrate quantum sensing, quantum networking, and quantum computing.

item.title: AI accelerates the search for room temperature superconductors
item.description: Researchers used machine learning and quantum physics to find two new superconductors, speeding up the discovery process.

item.title: Rye pollen mystery solved after 30 years, aiding cancer research
item.description: Scientists have resolved a long-standing puzzle about two molecules in rye pollen that showed potential for cancer treatment.
